# User template — Long-form (English)

## Placeholders

`{{title_angle}}` `{{word_count}}` `{{tone}}` `{{outline}}` `{{seo_primary}}` `{{secondary_keywords}}`

## Template

"Write a long-form article (`{{word_count}}` words) with this angle: `{{title_angle}}`, in `{{tone}}` tone. Use this outline: `{{outline}}`. Primary SEO keyword: `{{seo_primary}}`. Secondary keywords: `{{secondary_keywords}}`."

## Filled example

"Write a 1500-word article with this angle: *How sustainable tourism is reshaping Red Sea travel choices*, in **Professional Premium** tone. Outline: intro, 3 practical criteria, real customer story, FAQ, conclusion CTA. Primary keyword: sustainable tourism Hurghada. Secondary keywords: eco resort Egypt, Red Sea responsible travel."
